title: How to automate moving an item to a different workspace?
excerpt:
Hi Monday community and admins, 
I was wondering if it is possible to automate the following: 
If a status changes to X move item to X in workspace X 
OR 
If a status changes to X create an item in Board X in workspace X …

posts.author: Jefes (JF)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday community and admins,

I was wondering if it is possible to automate the following:
If a status changes to X move item to X in workspace X
OR
If a status changes to X create an item in Board X in workspace X

The usecase is that I would like to be able to automatically create an item in our Project Management workspace when an item in our Sales workspace is given a certain status.

Is there a way to do this within Monday?
Or perhaps a workaround?

posts.author: JPinBe (John Pescod)
posts.cookedHtml: If you can actually create different “Workspaces” then you must be on the Enterprise plan because the other plans do not allow this. However maybe you mean different boards?

posts.author: CMcConnell (Colin McConnell)
posts.cookedHtml: All the plans allow workspaces. Enterprise allows them to be ‘private’.

posts.author: CMcConnell (Colin McConnell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a relative newbie, but I think the situation is this -

You wouldn’t explicitly reference a workspace, but you can create an item in a different board, and that board can be in any workspace you like.

You can move your item, but only to a different ‘group’, and a group is a subdivision of the current board.

So it sounds like the first case is the one you want; i.e. this automation -

image957×712 44.8 KB

posts.author: JPinBe (John Pescod)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the heads up. I hadn’t yet seen that particular menu.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
